title: Manik Baasha
subTitle: Bound by a promise to his late father, a gangster becomes an autorickshaw driver. However, when his past catches up with him, he must choose between succumbing to his old ways and keeping his word.

title: Inteqam
subTitle: Vijay, a dedicated police officer, is shattered to discover his brother Aftab is a ruthless criminal. Torn between duty and love, Vijay embarks on a relentless quest to bring him to justice.

title: Mawali Raaj
subTitle: In order to obtain a family of their own, two young children of two single parents devise a plan to bring them together.

title: International Khiladi: The Iron Man
subTitle: Amrita's parents get killed. Years later, she falls in love with Aditya only to learn that he was the one who was accused of her parents' murder.

title: Conjuring Kannappan
subTitle: When a man plucks a feather off a dreamcatcher, he has nightmares where injuries reflect in the real world. But when this affects his family and friends, they decide to find the root of the problem.

title: DD Returns
subTitle: An event manager and his friends hide the money they stole in a haunted bungalow to evade the police but when they go back to retrieve it, the ghosts force them to play a dangerous game.

title: MCA: Middle Class Abbayi
subTitle: Nani, a middle-class boy with an eidetic memory, helps save his sister-in-law from a goon. Meanwhile, he also tries to convince his girlfriend's father to marry her off to him.

title: Saindhav
subTitle: A man with a traumatic past is compelled to encounter an crime boss so that he can rescue his daughter from a health problem.

title: Dangerous Khiladi 2
subTitle: A corrupt minister's daughter finds a diary containing details about a couple's relationship. When the story ends abruptly, she sets out to find the person who wrote it.

title: Choron Ka Chor
subTitle: Choron Ka Chor

title: Choron Ka Chor
subTitle: Choron Ka Chor

title: Sukumarudu
subTitle: Sukumar decides to come back to India to acquire his grandmother's property. Unfortunately, his family members try to cause problems for him.

title: Mahabali Bal Ganesh VI
subTitle: Top, Dhoti and Suitboot land on Kailash Parbat where they meet Nandi and Mooshak Raj. There, they come across stories about Bal Ganesh, who fights to rid the world of demons.

title: Mera Insaaf
subTitle: Sekhar and Madhurima's happily married life is ruined when he's falsely accused of being Maoist by corrupt officials. However, Geeta, a journalist, tries to prove his innocence but to no avail.

title: Etharkkum Thunindhavan
subTitle: Kannabiran, a lawyer, saves a young woman from a pornography racket run by Inba, a minister's son. However, Inba threatens to leak explicit videos of several women, making Kannabiran go after him.

title: VIP 2 Lalkar
subTitle: A businesswoman is enraged when a civil engineer declines her job offer. With revenge on her mind, she decides to make his life troublesome.

title: Gatta Kusthi
subTitle: Veera has a preconceived set of criteria for what he wants in a bride. However, he ends up unexpectedly marrying a woman who is the complete opposite of his expectations.

title: Darbar
subTitle: Aaditya, a high-ranking law enforcement official, sets out to eradicate the city's gangsters. As the events unfold, it becomes clear that his motivations are deeply personal.

title: Double Attack
subTitle: Siddharth and Charan, two lookalikes who are fighting their own battles against evildoers, cross paths and join forces to take down Rawat, a ruthless minister.

title: Power Unlimited 2
subTitle: Karthikeya, a man who is devoted to his family, faces a huge challenge as his violent and turbulent past begins to resurface.

title: Power Unlimited 2
subTitle: Karthikeya, a man who is devoted to his family, faces a huge challenge as his violent and turbulent past begins to resurface.

title: Kayamkulam Kochunni
subTitle: Ill-treated since childhood by the wealthy people, Kayamkulam Kochunni decides to steal from the rich and feed the poor and the lower caste community, thus growing into a hero for the downtrodden.

title: Khakee
subTitle: A deputy commissioner and his crew attempt to transport a terrorist to Mumbai, but their mission is thwarted by an ex-policeman with an agenda of his own.

title: Jigar Kaleja
subTitle: A short tempered cab driver, Raju, unwillingly becomes the saviour of a village. When an industrialist tries to drive away the villagers by polluting their water and air, Raju steps up to help them.

title: Bharaate
subTitle: Jagan, a local travel guide, falls in love with Radha, a tourist who visits his city. Though she leaves without saying goodbye, fate conspires to being them together again.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: Aakhri Yudh
subTitle: Babji, a loan recovery agent, decides to help Kavya when he finds her being chased by her family. However, Kavya's brother thinks that Babji and her sister are lovers and attacks his family.

title: Yashoda
subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: Dashing CM Bharat
subTitle: Bharat, a graduate from Oxford, is forced to take up his father's position as the chief minister after his sudden death. He tries to reform the corrupt society but faces obstacles from his enemies.

title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.
